description: Square 'THE WORST FIRST' card in the standard template. The background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands locked in metal handcuffs, with a dark gradient on the left side. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/13/2025 | Houston, TX'. A red diagonal corner banner at top-right reads 'HOUSTON'. Large bold white name at mid-left: 'Rogelio Hernandez'. Bold white 'CRIME:' label with the bullet 'Aggravated child sexual assault'. The bottom-left has a round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; the bottom-right has a red box reading '-THE- WORST FIRST'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/13/2025 | Houston, TX; Rogelio Hernandez; CRIME: Aggravated child sexual assault; HOUSTON; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
